item.title: [Segurança] Citrix urges admins to patch NetScaler flaws as soon as possible
item.description:
💣 Citrix urges admins to patch NetScaler flaws as soon as possible
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Citrix has patched two NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway vulnerabilities, one of which is very similar to the CitrixBleed and CitrixBleed2 flaws exploited in zero-day attacks in recent years.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/citrix-urges-admins-to-patch-netscaler-flaws-as-soon-as-possible/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] WP Packages is Working the Way Open Source Should
item.description:
📰 WP Packages is Working the Way Open Source Should
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: https://wordpress.org/news/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
When WP Engine acquired WPackagist on March 12, the WordPress developer community faced a familiar question: what happens when critical open source infrastructure ends up under corporate control? The community already had an answer in progress. Four days later, WP Packages (formerly WP Composer) launched as a fully independent, community-funded alternative, with some neat additional […]
Link: https://wordpress.org/news/2026/03/wp-packages/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] SIEM-as-a-Service offering leverages Elastic for unified cybersecurity across the US government
item.description:
📰 SIEM-as-a-Service offering leverages Elastic for unified cybersecurity across the US government
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
CISA has awarded Elastic a contract to provide SIEM as a Service (SIEMaaS) to US federal civilian agencies in an effort to standardize threat hunting, cybersecurity monitoring, and incident response across the government.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/siem-as-a-service
